mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO order_detail (name, order_id, dish_id, setmeal_id, dish_flavor, number, amount, image) VALUES
(#{od.name}, #{od.orderId}, #{od.dishId}, #{od.setmealId}, #{od.dishFlavor}, #{od.number}, #{od.amount}, #{od.image})
mapper.select: select * from orders where user_id = #{userId} order by order_time desc

select * from order_detail where order_id in
#{orderId}
